modules.sql: WITH purpose_counts AS (SELECT bv.branch_id, bv.visit_purpose, bv.ifw_effective_date, COUNT(*) AS visit_count, SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (PARTITION BY bv.branch_id, bv.ifw_effective_date) AS total_branch_visits FROM branch_visits bv GROUP BY bv.branch_id, bv.visit_purpose, bv.ifw_effective_date) SELECT pc.branch_id, b.branch_name, pc.visit_purpose, pc.ifw_effective_date, pc.visit_count FROM purpose_counts pc JOIN branches b ON pc.branch_id = b.branch_id AND pc.ifw_effective_date = b.ifw_effective_date ORDER BY pc.ifw_effective_date, pc.branch_id, pc.visit_purpose
